This Virtual Test suite is for testing enabling of additional WebCrypto
algorithms, specifically:

* ChaCha20-Poly1305
* ML-DSA
* ML-KEM

ChaCha20-Poly1305 is not a PQC algorithm, but is being added to the WebCrypto
standard in the same spec at https://wicg.github.io/webcrypto-modern-algos/

See https://chromestatus.com/feature/5198951632470016
